description: Address review findings: replace reference-equality gate with boolean flag and add non-eligible branch test coverage
steps: Step 1 - Replace reference-equality gate in src/sse/services/auth.tsx: Add `const isCanonicalTransientUpstream = !authBlockedPatch && Boolean(transientUpstreamPatch);` and use it instead of `canonicalBlockedPatch === transientUpstreamPatch`
Step 2 - Add test for non-eligible transient path in tests/unit/status-handling-transient-auth.test.ts
Step 3 - Run typecheck and tests to verify
acceptance_criteria: skipTransientSync no longer uses reference equality (===) between objects
New test verifies that non-eligible connections still get full dirty patch on transient errors
verification: export PATH=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/bun/1.2.14/bin:$PATH && bun x vitest run --reporter=verbose --root tests -- tests/unit/status-handling-transient-auth.test.ts
findings: Both review issues addressed. Typecheck passes. All status-handling-transient-auth tests pass (including new non-eligible test). The model-combo-mapping-routes test failures (z.object undefined) remain pre-existing and unrelated.
